files.notes: This file contains 4 lesson sections that were merged together. The lessons cover Genealogy/Testimony, Work/Business, Book of Mormon/Bible study, and Social Service topics. There appears to be some content mixing between lessons, particularly with the Tennyson literature section appearing to be part of Lesson III but continuing into Lesson IV territory. The second lesson appears to be just a header with no content.
